title: Kochi Rajavu
desc: Tragedy strikes when Unni accidentally kills his lover's cousin, resulting in his imprisonment.

title: Odela 2
desc: When a rapist is improperly buried, his ghost begins haunting his village and attacking innocent women. As chaos arises, the villagers look for an answer.

title: Revolver Rita
desc: A woman begins to chase down the culprits after her handbag is stolen. However, things take a turn when the thieves find weapons in their loot, causing them to question the identity of their victim.
